title: GirlZone Unicorn Teddy, 18-Inch Stuffed Pink Plush Unicorn for Girls with Pretty Glitter Horn, Soft and Cuddly, Great Birthday Gift Idea for Girls
description: Product Description Unicorn Gifts for Girls! GirlZone Unicorn Teddy Made for snuggles! We have manufactured this lovely unicorn with cuddles and snuggles in mind so it has been made using only soft fabrics and materials. Ideal for snuggling at bedtime and when all you need is a cuddle. Special logo hoof The Unicorn has a GirlZone velvet love heart stamped on a special hoof - making Unicorn magic! Magical glitter horn The glitter horn makes this Unicorn stand out from the rest as well as it’s gorgeous pink fur. Large plush toy The Unicorn is a great size for little girls - big enough for proper cuddles! Bedtime snuggles! We have manufactured this lovely unicorn with cuddles and snuggles in mind so it has been made using only soft fabrics and materials. Great Birthday present idea! The Birthday present pile won’t be complete this year without our stunning, cuddly Unicorn!
